description: Call GET /api/v1/google/scholar/author for Google SERP Scholar Author through Just Serp API with author_id.

operations.description: Get Google scholar Author data, including publications, citation metrics, and research interests, for researcher analysis and academic profiling.

parameters.description: The unique Google Scholar ID of the researcher/author (e.g., 'LSs6DR8AAAAJ').
parameters.name: author_id

parameters.description: The number of results to return per page.
parameters.name: results

parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.
parameters.name: language

parameters.description: Specific view operation for the author profile. Use 'list_colleagues' to see co-authors or 'view_citation' for article details.
parameters.name: view_op

parameters.description: Sorting criteria for the author's publications. Supported values: 'title', 'pubdate'.
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: The citation ID to view details for (required when 'view_op' is 'view_citation').
parameters.name: citation_id

responses.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing
Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded
Internal server error or upstream service exception
